---
output:
  md_document:
    variant: markdown_github
---

# Purpose

This is the root folder of the Data Science 871 Part A practical assessment. Each Question will be answered under its own question folder above. Each question has been knitted into an .md file, with the only exception being Question 1 where in addition an .pptx was generated.

- Question 1: Coffee Hub Analysis
- Question 2: Baby Names Analysis
- Question 3: Loan and Credit Analysis
- Question 4: Netflix Analysis

```{r, echo=FALSE, Warning= FALSE, Message = FALSE}

rm(list = ls()) # Clean your environment:
gc() # garbage collection - It can be useful to call gc after a large object has been removed, as this may prompt R to return memory to the operating system.
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
list.files('code/', full.names = T, recursive = T) %>% .[grepl('.R', .)] %>% as.list() %>% walk(~source(.))
```
